CE1.justification: Acted directly and posed one targeted binary choice to the user; no requirement to reconstruct prior context.

CE2.justification: Several stretches of unrequested prose — full parenthetical listing four alternative consequences, plus duplicated 'no ACID isn't one of them' framing — beyond what's needed to surface the error.

CE3.justification: Closing sentence states where in one clause with implicit reason: 'I have not written to decisions.md yet and have not modified the draft in tmp/.'

CE4.justification: No artifacts created or modified at all; an interrupt leaves the workspace identical to its starting state.
